Get Started Today

title: How to Build a Profitable E-Commerce Website in Bangladesh
title_bn: বাংলাদেশে লাভজনক ই-কমার্স ওয়েবসাইট তৈরি করবেন যেভাবে
excerpt: A complete guide for Bangladeshi entrepreneurs on launching an online store with bKash, Nagad and card payment integrations.
excerpt_bn: বিকাশ, নগদ ও কার্ড পেমেন্ট ইন্টিগ্রেশন সহ অনলাইন স্টোর চালু করতে বাংলাদেশের উদ্যোক্তাদের জন্য সম্পূর্ণ গাইড।
content:
Why E-Commerce is Booming in Bangladesh

Bangladesh's digital economy is growing at an unprecedented pace. With over 130 million smartphone users and a thriving mobile banking ecosystem (bKash, Nagad, Rocket), there has never been a better time to launch an online store.

Step 1: Choose Your Platform

For most businesses in Bangladesh, WooCommerce (WordPress) or a custom Laravel solution works best. WooCommerce offers hundreds of ready-made plugins, while Laravel gives you complete control over your business logic.

Step 2: Integrate Local Payment Gateways

Your customers expect to pay via bKash or Nagad. Make sure you integrate:

  • bKash Payment Gateway — the #1 mobile wallet in BD
  • Nagad — government-backed and trusted
  • SSL Commerz — supports all major cards
  • AamarPay — great for SMEs

Step 3: Mobile-First Design

Over 85% of Bangladeshi online shoppers browse on mobile. Your store must load in under 3 seconds and work flawlessly on low-end Android devices.

Step 4: SEO & Marketing

Register your business on Google Business Profile, set up Facebook Pixel, and start Bengali-language SEO content targeting keywords like অনলাইন শপিং বাংলাদেশ.

Get Started Today

Code Craft BD has helped 40+ businesses launch profitable online stores in Bangladesh. Contact us for a free consultation.

title: Complete SEO Guide: How to Rank #1 on Google in Bangladesh
title_bn: সম্পূর্ণ SEO গাইড: বাংলাদেশে Google-এ ১ নম্বরে আসবেন যেভাবে
excerpt: Learn the proven SEO strategies that helped our clients achieve #1 rankings on Google Bangladesh for competitive keywords.
excerpt_bn: প্রমাণিত SEO কৌশল যা আমাদের ক্লায়েন্টদের প্রতিযোগিতামূলক কীওয়ার্ডে বাংলাদেশে Google-এ ১ নম্বরে নিয়ে গেছে।
content:
Why SEO Matters More Than Ever in Bangladesh

With 50+ million active internet users in Bangladesh and Google processing over 2 billion searches per day, appearing on page 1 of Google is no longer optional — it's essential for business survival.

The 4 Pillars of SEO for Bangladeshi Businesses

1. Technical SEO

Your website must score 90+ on Google PageSpeed Insights. Critical technical fixes include:

  • Compress images to WebP format
  • Enable server-side caching
  • Use a CDN (Cloudflare is free)
  • Fix all broken links and 404 errors
  • Implement proper SSL (HTTPS)

2. On-Page SEO

Every page needs a unique, keyword-rich title tag (under 60 chars), a compelling meta description (under 160 chars), and a single H1 tag. Use Bengali keywords naturally throughout your content.

3. Off-Page SEO

Build backlinks from reputable Bangladeshi websites, local news portals, and business directories. Guest posting on popular blogs is still effective.

4. Local SEO

Claim and optimise your Google Business Profile. Collect genuine 5-star reviews. List your business on Bangladeshi directories like Bikroy, Shohoz, and chaldal.

Bengali Keyword Research

Many competitors ignore Bengali keywords — this is your opportunity. Tools like Google Keyword Planner and Ubersuggest support Bengali. Target keywords like ওয়েব ডিজাইন ঢাকা, সেরা ডিজিটাল মার্কেটিং এজেন্সি.

Results You Can Expect

With consistent effort, most businesses see significant ranking improvements within 3-6 months. One of our clients, a Dhaka fashion brand, achieved #1 ranking for 45 target keywords and doubled organic traffic in 6 months.

title: How AI Automation is Saving Bangladeshi Businesses 10+ Hours Per Week
title_bn: AI অটোমেশন কীভাবে বাংলাদেশের ব্যবসাগুলোকে সপ্তাহে ১০+ ঘণ্টা বাঁচাচ্ছে
excerpt: Discover how small and medium businesses in Bangladesh are using AI tools to automate repetitive tasks and boost productivity.
excerpt_bn: জানুন কীভাবে বাংলাদেশের ছোট ও মাঝারি ব্যবসাগুলো পুনরাবৃত্তিমূলক কাজ স্বয়ংক্রিয় করতে AI ব্যবহার করছে।
content:
The AI Revolution Has Reached Bangladesh

You don't need to be a tech giant to benefit from artificial intelligence. In 2025, AI tools are affordable, accessible, and transforming how Bangladeshi SMEs operate.

Real Tasks You Can Automate Right Now

1. Customer Service with AI Chatbots

An AI-powered chatbot on WhatsApp or your website can handle 70% of customer inquiries automatically — 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. No salary, no sick days.

  • Answer product questions
  • Process simple orders
  • Collect customer contact information
  • Route complex queries to human agents

2. Invoice & Billing Automation

Stop manually creating invoices in Excel. A Python script connected to your spreadsheets can auto-generate professional PDF invoices, send them via WhatsApp or email, and track payment status.

3. Social Media Scheduling

Tools like Buffer, Hootsuite, or a custom Python script can auto-post to Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn at the optimal times — even while you sleep.

4. Email Marketing Automation

Set up automated email sequences for new leads, abandoned cart recovery, and post-purchase follow-ups. This alone can recover 15-20% of lost sales.

Case Study: AutoInvoice for a Dhaka Accounting Firm

We built a custom automation system for a 12-person accounting firm in Dhaka. The system now auto-generates and sends 200+ invoices per month, saving the team 10+ hours per week and virtually eliminating payment delays.

Getting Started

Start small. Identify your most repetitive task and automate it first. Talk to us — we'll assess your workflow and propose a custom automation solution.

title: React Native vs Flutter: Best Choice for Mobile Apps in Bangladesh
title_bn: React Native বনাম Flutter: বাংলাদেশে মোবাইল অ্যাপের জন্য কোনটি সেরা?
excerpt: Comparing the two leading cross-platform mobile frameworks to help Bangladeshi entrepreneurs choose the right technology for their app.
excerpt_bn: দুটি শীর্ষ ক্রস-প্ল্যাটফর্ম মোবাইল ফ্রেমওয়ার্কের তুলনা করে বাংলাদেশী উদ্যোক্তাদের সঠিক প্রযুক্তি বেছে নিতে সাহায্য করুন।
content:
Why Mobile Apps Matter for Bangladeshi Businesses

Bangladesh has over 100 million mobile internet users. A dedicated mobile app can dramatically increase customer engagement, retention, and revenue compared to mobile websites alone.

React Native: Pros & Cons

✅ Advantages

  • Large developer community — easier to hire
  • JavaScript-based — familiar to web developers
  • Excellent performance for most apps
  • Facebook/Meta backed with long-term support
  • Huge ecosystem of third-party libraries

❌ Disadvantages

  • Can struggle with highly complex animations
  • Some native modules require additional bridging

Flutter: Pros & Cons

✅ Advantages

  • Extremely smooth 60/120fps animations
  • Single codebase for iOS, Android, AND Web
  • Growing rapidly with strong Google backing
  • Beautiful Material Design components built-in

❌ Disadvantages

  • Dart language — smaller talent pool in Bangladesh
  • Larger app bundle sizes
  • Fewer third-party libraries than React Native

Our Recommendation for Bangladesh

For most Bangladeshi startups, React Native is the better choice due to the larger developer community and JavaScript familiarity. However, if your app requires complex animations or a stunning UI (e.g., a luxury fashion or food delivery app), consider Flutter.

Budget Expectations

A basic MVP mobile app in Bangladesh costs between ৳80,000 – ৳2,50,000 depending on features and complexity. A full-featured app with backend can range from ৳3,00,000 to ৳10,00,000+.

title: Why Speed Kills: How a 1-Second Delay Costs Bangladeshi Businesses 7% Revenue
title_bn: কেন গতি গুরুত্বপূর্ণ: ১ সেকেন্ড দেরি কীভাবে বাংলাদেশের ব্যবসার ৭% আয় কেটে নেয়
excerpt: Website performance directly impacts your bottom line. Learn the exact optimisation steps to make your site lightning-fast.
excerpt_bn: ওয়েবসাইটের পারফরম্যান্স সরাসরি আপনার আয়ে প্রভাব ফেলে। আপনার সাইটকে দ্রুততম করার সঠিক পদক্ষেপগুলি শিখুন।
content:
The Numbers Don't Lie

Research by Google shows that a 1-second delay in mobile page load time reduces conversions by 7% and increases bounce rate by 11%. For a website generating ৳1,00,000/month, that's ৳7,000 lost every month — just from slow loading.

How to Measure Your Current Speed

Use these free tools to benchmark your site:

  • Google PageSpeed Insights — free, detailed, actionable
  • GTmetrix — shows waterfall loading diagram
  • WebPageTest — tests from real Bangladesh locations

The Top 7 Speed Fixes

1. Compress & Convert Images to WebP

Images are typically 60-80% of a page's total size. Converting PNG/JPG to WebP reduces file size by 30-50% with no visible quality loss. Use tools like Squoosh or Sharp.

2. Enable Caching

Set proper Cache-Control headers so returning visitors load your site from their browser cache instead of your server. This can improve repeat-visit load times by 80%+.

3. Use a CDN

Cloudflare's free tier delivers your static assets from servers closest to your users — crucial in Bangladesh where server distances affect latency significantly.

4. Minify CSS, JS & HTML

Remove whitespace, comments, and unused code from your assets. Tools like Webpack, Vite, and Next.js do this automatically in production builds.

5. Implement Lazy Loading

Only load images and components when they enter the viewport. Add loading="lazy" to all non-critical images.

6. Reduce Server Response Time

Your Time to First Byte (TTFB) should be under 200ms. Upgrade to a modern hosting provider (DigitalOcean, Linode, or VPS) if needed.

7. Upgrade to Next.js or Astro

Framework-level optimisations (automatic code splitting, image optimisation, server-side rendering) can improve Core Web Vitals scores dramatically.

title: Brand Identity Design: Why Your Logo is Only 5% of the Story
title_bn: ব্র্যান্ড আইডেন্টিটি ডিজাইন: কেন আপনার লোগো মাত্র ৫% গল্প বলে
excerpt: A strong brand goes far beyond a logo. Learn the complete brand identity framework that Bangladeshi businesses need to stand out.
excerpt_bn: একটি শক্তিশালী ব্র্যান্ড শুধু লোগোর চেয়ে অনেক বেশি। বাংলাদেশের ব্যবসার আলাদা হওয়ার জন্য সম্পূর্ণ ব্র্যান্ড আইডেন্টিটি ফ্রেমওয়ার্ক শিখুন।
content:
What Is Brand Identity?

Brand identity is the collection of all visual and emotional elements that make your business recognisable and trustworthy. It's NOT just your logo — it's everything a customer sees, hears, and feels when they interact with your business.

The 8 Elements of a Strong Brand Identity

1. Brand Strategy

Before designing anything, define your: Mission (why you exist), Vision (where you're going), Values (what you believe), and Positioning (how you differ from competitors).

2. Logo Design

Your logo should work in: full colour, black & white, small sizes (16×16px favicon), and large formats (billboard). A great logo is simple, memorable, and timeless.

3. Colour Palette

Choose 1 primary colour, 1-2 secondary colours, and neutral tones. Colours trigger emotions: red (energy/urgency), green (trust/growth), blue (professionalism), gold (luxury).

4. Typography

Select a maximum of 2 fonts: one for headings (distinctive) and one for body text (highly readable). For Bangladeshi businesses, ensure your chosen fonts support Bengali Unicode.

5. Voice & Tone

How does your brand speak? Formal or casual? Technical or simple? Friendly or professional? Document this and apply it consistently across all content.

6. Brand Patterns & Textures

Unique graphic patterns, icons, and illustrations that complement your logo and create a cohesive visual language across all touchpoints.

7. Photography Style

Establish guidelines for the type of images you use — bright/airy vs dark/moody, lifestyle vs product shots, etc.

8. Brand Guidelines Document

Compile everything into a brand guidelines PDF that your team, designers, and printers can follow consistently.

Common Branding Mistakes in Bangladesh

  • Copying competitor logos (legally risky and damages trust)
  • Using too many colours (looks amateur)
  • Inconsistency across platforms (destroys recognition)
  • Ignoring Bengali typography (alienates local customers)

title: Why Every School in Bangladesh Needs a Digital Management System
title_bn: কেন বাংলাদেশের প্রতিটি স্কুলের একটি ডিজিটাল ম্যানেজমেন্ট সিস্টেম দরকার
excerpt: Manual registers and paper reports are costing schools time and money. Here's what a modern school management system can do for you.
excerpt_bn: ম্যানুয়াল রেজিস্টার এবং কাগজের রিপোর্ট স্কুলের সময় ও অর্থ নষ্ট করছে। আধুনিক স্কুল ম্যানেজমেন্ট সিস্টেম আপনার জন্য কী করতে পারে তা জানুন।
content:
The State of School Administration in Bangladesh

Most schools in Bangladesh still rely on manual processes: paper attendance registers, handwritten report cards, physical fee collection, and verbal parent communication. This costs enormous time and creates room for errors and disputes.

What a School Management System Does

📋 Student Records Management

Digitise all student information — admission details, academic history, medical records, and contact information — searchable in seconds.

✅ Automated Attendance

Teachers mark attendance digitally via tablet or phone. The system automatically notifies parents via SMS if their child is absent. End of manual attendance registers.

📊 Online Results & Report Cards

Generate professional PDF report cards automatically. Parents can view results from their phone. No more printing, no lost papers.

💰 Fee Collection with bKash

Parents pay school fees directly via bKash, Nagad, or bank transfer. The system tracks payment status and sends automatic reminders for overdue fees.

👨‍👩‍👧 Parent Portal

Parents get a dedicated portal to view: attendance records, upcoming exams, homework assignments, fee receipts, and school announcements.

📱 SMS & WhatsApp Notifications

Auto-send important announcements, exam schedules, result notifications, and emergency alerts to all parents instantly.

Case Study: EduBD Implementation

We implemented a complete school management system for a 1,200-student school in Dhaka. Results after 6 months:

  • Result processing time reduced by 3×
  • Fee collection disputes reduced by 90%
  • Parent satisfaction scores increased by 40%
  • Administrative staff workload reduced by 60%

Investment & ROI

A complete school management system starts from ৳1,50,000 for a basic implementation. Most schools recover this investment within 6 months through efficiency gains alone.

title: VPS vs Shared Hosting: What Every Bangladeshi Business Owner Must Know
title_bn: VPS বনাম শেয়ার্ড হোস্টিং: প্রতিটি বাংলাদেশী ব্যবসা মালিকের যা জানা জরুরি
excerpt: Stop overpaying for slow shared hosting. Learn when to upgrade to a VPS and how it will transform your website's performance.
excerpt_bn: ধীর শেয়ার্ড হোস্টিংয়ের জন্য অতিরিক্ত অর্থ প্রদান বন্ধ করুন। জানুন কখন VPS-এ আপগ্রেড করবেন এবং এটি কীভাবে আপনার ওয়েবসাইটের পারফরম্যান্স পরিবর্তন করবে।
content:
The Hosting Confusion Problem

Most small businesses in Bangladesh start with shared hosting packages from local providers like ExonHost, HostMight, or WebHostBD. This is fine for beginners — but as your business grows, shared hosting becomes a serious bottleneck.

What Is Shared Hosting?

With shared hosting, your website shares a server with hundreds (sometimes thousands) of other websites. It's cheap (৳300-৳1,200/month) but has significant limitations:

  • Slow during traffic spikes (other sites hog resources)
  • No control over server configuration
  • Security risks from neighbouring sites
  • Limited to PHP/MySQL — no Node.js, Python, etc.

What Is a VPS?

A Virtual Private Server gives you a dedicated slice of a physical server with guaranteed resources. You get root access, can install any software, and your performance isn't affected by other tenants.

When Should You Upgrade?

Consider upgrading to a VPS when:

  • Your site gets 1,000+ daily visitors
  • You're running a WooCommerce store with 50+ products
  • Your site often times out or crashes
  • You need Node.js, Python, or custom server software
  • You're handling sensitive customer data (payments)

Best VPS Providers for Bangladesh in 2025

International (Recommended)

  • DigitalOcean — starts at $6/month, Singapore region (closest to BD)
  • Linode/Akamai — excellent performance, Singapore region
  • Vultr — competitive pricing, Mumbai region
  • Hetzner — cheapest option, Europe-based

Local Bangladesh Providers

  • ExonHost VPS — Bangladeshi support, BDT billing
  • HostMight VPS — local data center

Recommended Setup for a New VPS

  1. Install Ubuntu 22.04 LTS
  2. Set up Nginx as web server
  3. Install Node.js (for Next.js apps) or PHP 8.2 (for WordPress)
  4. Configure SSL with Let's Encrypt (free)
  5. Set up PM2 for process management
  6. Configure automated daily backups

Code Craft BD offers complete VPS setup and management services. Contact us and we'll have your server production-ready in 24 hours.
